ctx.name: Usman
ctx.notes: They have not passed probation but doing very well

introQueue.label: Curiosity
introQueue.name: What's something you've been curious about lately?
introQueue.description: Positions them as active and alive, not performing. Works as a natural growth-oriented opener.

introQueue.label: Growth blockers
introQueue.name: What's in your way of getting to the next level — not what's missing, what's actively blocking?
introQueue.description: Forces specificity about obstacles rather than vague 'more opportunities please'.

introQueue.label: Direction
introQueue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
introQueue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

focus_points.label: How they see their growth path as a Lead.
focus_points.reason: Growth & career plan for a Lead — understanding their vision for their own growth helps align support and opportunities.

focus_points.label: Feedback they're receiving and giving as a Lead.
focus_points.reason: Feedback is a key growth lever at this level — understanding both directions is crucial for development.

focus_points.label: Clarity on expectations and scope as a Lead.
focus_points.reason: They are still in probation, so ensuring they understand the role's expectations is critical for their success.

brief.coreIssue: Usman is performing well but has not yet passed probation. This meeting focuses on understanding his growth path as a Lead Scrum Master, ensuring clarity on role expectations, and exploring feedback dynamics. Aligning his vision with your support will be key to his continued success.
brief.openingQuestion: What does your ideal growth path look like as a Lead Scrum Master, and how can I support you in achieving that vision?
listenFor: whether Usman has a clear vision for his growth
if they feel confident about role expectations
avoid: do not assume Usman knows all role expectations
do not focus solely on current performance metrics
brief.goodOutcome: You understand Usman's growth vision and have aligned on role expectations and feedback mechanisms.
brief.suggestedAction: Schedule a follow-up in one month to review progress on role clarity and feedback implementation.

queueRef.label: Curiosity
queueRef.name: What's something you've been curious about lately?
queueRef.description: Positions them as active and alive, not performing. Works as a natural growth-oriented opener.

queueRef.label: Growth blockers
queueRef.name: What's in your way of getting to the next level — not what's missing, what's actively blocking?
queueRef.description: Forces specificity about obstacles rather than vague 'more opportunities please'.

queueRef.label: Direction
queueRef.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
queueRef.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

queueRef.label: Role solidity check
queueRef.name: What's feeling solid in your role right now, and what's stretching you?
queueRef.description: Surfaces current confidence and areas of challenge in their role.

queueRef.label: Feedback dynamics
queueRef.name: What's a piece of feedback you've received recently that has impacted you?
queueRef.description: Explores how feedback is influencing their development and role.

queueRef.label: Future role vision
queueRef.name: What specific role or responsibilities do you envision for yourself in the future?
queueRef.description: Identifies their aspirations and clarity on future roles.

queueRef.label: Scope clarity
queueRef.name: What parts of your current role feel unclear or need more definition?
queueRef.description: Highlights areas where role expectations are vague.

queueRef.label: Skill gap identification
queueRef.name: What skill do you feel you need to develop to reach your next career milestone?
queueRef.description: Pinpoints skills they believe are necessary for advancement.

queueRef.label: Feedback loop
queueRef.name: How are you incorporating feedback from your team into your leadership style?
queueRef.description: Examines how they are using feedback to evolve as a leader.

queueRef.label: Investment priorities
queueRef.name: If you could focus on one area for personal development, what would it be and why?
queueRef.description: Explores personal development priorities and reasoning.

queueRef.label: Trade-offs
queueRef.name: What are you willing to deprioritize to focus on your growth goals?
queueRef.description: Identifies what they are willing to trade off to achieve growth.

queueRef.label: Commitment to action
queueRef.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?
queueRef.description: Establishes a specific goal or action to be achieved before the next meeting.

closer.label: Commitment to action
closer.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?
closer.description: Establishes a specific goal or action to be achieved before the next meeting.
